name: Aristocrat Leisure Limited
analysis: ALL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 18% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$54.9500. Trade idea: entry A$58.6900, stop A$51.1038, target A$81.4486 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
